title: Blood moon cursed Terror
description: a blood moon in your minecraft server FOR HORROR and more !
body:
Description

BloodMoon is a simple horror-themed Minecraft plugin that occasionally turns a normal night into a terrifying “Red Moon” event.

When night falls, there is a random chance that the moon will turn red. During this time, the world becomes more dangerous and oppressive. Players will experience unsettling sounds, stronger mobs, and a constant feeling of being watched.

Features
Random Red Moon Event
A Blood Moon can start at sunset with a configurable chance. A subtle message warns players that something is wrong.
Horror Atmosphere
Ambient sounds like distant growls and strange noises play around players to create tension.
Enhanced Mobs
Hostile mobs become stronger, faster, and more aggressive during the event.
Shadow Creatures
Rare, fast, and nearly invisible enemies may appear and hunt players in the dark.
Player Pressure
Small negative effects (like slight slowness or reduced regeneration) increase the difficulty and fear factor.
Optimization

The plugin is lightweight and optimized:

Uses scheduled tasks with low frequency
Limits special mob spawns
Automatically disables during daytime
Goal

Create a simple but effective horror experience that makes every night feel unpredictable and dangerous, without impacting server performance.
